name: backend-template
description: Enterprise-ready backend template with hybrid monolith + microservices architecture

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w main" "npm run dev -w microservices/auth-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/users-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/notifications-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/payment-service"
scripts.build: npm run build -w main && npm run build -w microservices/auth-service && npm run build -w microservices/users-service && npm run build -w microservices/notifications-service && npm run build -w microservices/payment-service
